paragraphs.en: on monday all must rest, so monday it will stay:shade the mirrors, slip the edges of the shears away.
paragraphs.zh: 周一人人都得休息，所以周一就这样停着：给镜子打上一层阴影，把剪刀的刃缘掀开。

paragraphs.en: who will knead his fingers now, circling, until the cloudof shampoo gathers over us; who will conduct his crowd
paragraphs.zh: 现在，谁还会揉着手指，绕着圈，直到洗发水般的泡沫云在我们上方聚起；谁会指挥他的那群人

paragraphs.en: of bottles on the shelf, the oils and fragrances,with small hands? who will blast the glorious organs
paragraphs.zh: 架上那些瓶子，油和香精，都是用小手吗？谁会发出宏伟器官的轰鸣

paragraphs.en: of blow dryers and let them roar, let them swell?of all the tints, take the black; darken up the colorful.
paragraphs.zh: 用吹风机的巨大嗓音，把它们全部放大、放声嘶鸣？把所有色调里挑出黑色；把鲜艳的颜色压暗。

paragraphs.en: now, magnificently, slowly as a tent, there are no capesto drape across the body; now anyone who stops
paragraphs.zh: 现在，宏伟而缓慢地，如同一顶帐篷，身体上再没有帽子可披；现在任何停下来的人

paragraphs.en: will not know where they’re going or what they’ll findbut that the hair keeps growing fuller, growing wild.
paragraphs.zh: 都不会知道自己要去哪里，也不会知道会找到什么；但头发却一直长得更浓、更狂野。

paragraphs.en: (Translated, from the German, by David Keplinger.)
paragraphs.zh: （译自德文，译者大卫·凯普林格）
